summary: Recording quality unknown; show criticized for the out‑of‑place placement of “St. of Circumstance”.
review: The lone reviewer is disappointed, noting that “St. of Circumstance” feels misplaced without its usual partner and even calls out a bias against Lost Sailor fans. No information about the audio source or sound quality was provided, leaving the recording itself unevaluated.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 0‑star rating and clear criticism; no data on recording quality to boost the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer feels the set’s flow is disrupted by the placement of “St. of Circumstance” without its usual partner.
